---
title: "\'A Good Example; or, A Manufacturing Town in France\'"
---

## \'A Good Example; or, A Manufacturing Town in France\'

**Author:** Henriette de Witt
**Date:** 1868
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (October 1868) 378-392

### Notes

This article about Mulhouse was translated by Miss North.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
